title: helosciadium repens
intro: Helosciadium repens, also known as Marsh Penny-cress, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and treat conditions such as indigestion and bloating. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal preparations to help reduce inflammation and improve overall health, with benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Helosciadium repens is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed raw or added to salads for its potential health benefits.
